## What does this PR do?

> One sentence. If you need three paragraphs to explain it, consider splitting it up.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (something was broken and now it isn't)
- [ ] New feature (something didn't exist and now it does)
- [ ] Refactor (code moved around, net result roughly the same)
- [ ] Docs (you fixed a typo and we're grateful)
- [ ] Other: ___

## How was this tested?

- [ ] I ran `pnpm test` and nothing exploded
- [ ] I tested it manually in the browser
- [ ] I added new tests for my changes
- [ ] I tested the edge cases (you did test the edge cases, right?)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code doesn't have any `console.log("here")` left in it
- [ ] I didn't introduce any `any` types without a very good reason
- [ ] I didn't commit my `.env` file (please tell me you didn't commit your `.env` file)
- [ ] The PR title is descriptive (not "fix stuff" or "changes")
- [ ] I'm not secretly refactoring three unrelated things in one PR

## Screenshots / recordings (if UI changes)

> Before and after. We won't merge blind.

## Anything the reviewer should know?

> Tricky parts, known limitations, things you're not sure about, or why you made an unusual decision. The weirder the choice, the more you should explain it here.
